title: Label
text: Label A Label is a Development Object that contains text that appears on a presentation component. Labels have properties, but most cannot be set dynamically. Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: lbl Main Development Object? No Part of: Component , Component Entity Contains: Property Generalization: Development Object Specializations: Associated Label , Non-Associated Label Compilation Output: — URI format: lbl: FieldName | lbl: LabelName Specialization Label specializes Development Object in the following ways: Its has a component or component entity as parent object. It has no child development objects or code containers. Properties Object Properties: Name Type Location Description Documentation Configuration Properties: Inherits Inherits From Associated Field Presentation properties: Label Text Presentation properties in forms and reports: Left (xpos) Top (ypos) Width (xsize) Height (ysize) Label Font Horizontal Alignment Vertical Alignment Transparency Index Color Repetition Inherit Colors (InheritColors) ( .ini file only) Anchor ( .ini file only) Related Links Frame A Frame is a Development Object that graphically represents a Development Object in the layout of a Form or Report component.
